import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import './Footer.css'; const Footer = () => (

Outer Ring Road, Devarabeesanahalli Village,
Bengaluru, 560103,
Karnataka, India

Clove Embassy Tech Village,
Outer Ring Road, Devarabeesanahalli Village,
Bengaluru, 560103,
Karnataka, India

Telephone: 044-45614700

); export default Footer;
